title: djura: A scientific Python toolkit for earthquake engineering
description: djura is an open-source Python toolkit for earthquake engineering. It provides GCIM-based ground motion record selection, hazard-consistent intensity measure analysis, vulnerability modelling, and storey loss function generation.
notes: Dual-licensed: AGPL-3.0-or-later for academic, research, and other open-source use; a commercial license is available from Djura | Risk - Data - Engineering S.r.l. (info@djura.it).
